response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Acme Software, which aligns with the role's focus areas. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), and Python — core requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. Customer-facing technical leadership experience is also not clearly evidenced. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of recent AI work.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with 13+ years shipping production systems across web, mobile, and embedded
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at Acme Software
Demonstrated teaching/mentorship ability via workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No clear evidence of Python proficiency or 8+ years specifically building AI-driven solutions
Missing demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, and multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting work with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow exposure
